creator: pgut001@cs.auckland.ac.nz
text: Just wrote the image, i.e. FreeBSD-12.0-RELEASE-arm64-aarch64-PINE64-LTS and FreeBSD-13.0-CURRENT-arm64-aarch64-PINE64-LTS to the eMMC and plugged it in.  I'll try and dig up a micro SD card that isn't already used by something else and try booting off that.
